payload.answer: Article ingestion aborted due to 404 error and URL format ambiguity. No durable memory committed. Original URL requires correction before reprocessing.

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguous URL format (missing punctuation) may indicate user error or system parsing failure. Requires manual validation before retry.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at URL 'https -//examplecom/missing' due to 404 network error (punctuation/format ambiguity in URL).

details: URL format contains punctuation ambiguity ('https -//' instead of 'https://')
No content ingested; no memory cards committed to durable storage

repair_options: Confirm article exists at intended location
